title: Trump on rumors his son may host 'Apprentice'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump responded to rumors that 'The Apprentice' may return on Amazon, hosted by his son Donald Trump Jr.

title: Trump: Secret Service not shot by friendly fire
shortDescription: President Trump said that a Secret Service agent shot at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner was not struck by friendly fire.

title: Trump's parting gift to royals: Tariff relief on Scotch
shortDescription: As King Charles III and Queen Camilla wrapped their US visit, President Trump said he gave the UK some tariff relief on whiskies.

title: Congress finally ends Homeland Security shutdown
shortDescription: The House finally ended the historic Department of Homeland Security shutdown, passing a funding bill for the agency with seemingly unanimous support.

title: Trump reacts to Iran participating in World Cup
shortDescription: President Trump reacts after FIFA president confirmed Iran will compete at the 2026 World Cup in the United States despite ongoing conflict concerns.

title: TrumpIRA.gov to broaden retirement savings access
shortDescription: Trump signs executive order creating TrumpIRA.gov, which workers whose employers don't offer 401(k) plans can use to enroll in a retirement plan.

title: Secret Service agent was not hit by friendly fire, Trump says
shortDescription: Trump said a Secret Service agent who was shot during the White House Correspondents' dinner wasn't struck by friendly fire.

title: House passes farm bill without controversial pesticides provision
shortDescription: The bill, which was amended to remove what critics called a "loophole" for pesticide companies, still faces an uphill battle in the Senate.

title: Trump considers wearing bulletproof best
shortDescription: President Donald Trump joked about wearing a bulletproof vest when asked about being shot at.

title: Trump nominates Fox News contributor as US surgeon general
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has nominated Dr. Nicole Saphier as the next U.S. surgeon general after the confirmation of his previous pick stalled.

title: Trump says Tennessee plans to redraw House maps after court ruling
shortDescription: President Trump said Tennessee Republicans have committed to redistricting to eliminate the state's only Democratic seat.

title: Trump sees King Charles III off after state visit
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and Melania Trump bid farewell to King Charles III and Queen Consort Camilla after their state visit.

title: Trumps bid farewell to King Charles and Queen Camilla
shortDescription: President Trump and Melania Trump bid farewell to King Charles III and Queen Camilla as the royal couple conclude a US state visit for America’s 250th anniversary.

title: Trump nominates Dr. Nicole Saphier as US surgeon general
shortDescription: Saphier is the director of breast imaging at Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center-Monmouth and an associate professor at Weill Cornell Medical College.

title: Trump task force releases controversial 'anti-Christian bias' report
shortDescription: A Trump task force probing "anti-Christian bias" has released a new report, which some advocacy groups challenged as deceptive and contradictory.

title: Oil prices hit $126 per barrel as Trump signals longer blockade
shortDescription: The global oil price has risen above $126 per barrel, the highest since 2022, following US President Donald Trump's warning that the US blockade of Iranian ports may continue for months.

title: Janet Mills drops out of Maine Senate race
shortDescription: Janet Mills dropped her Maine Senate bid citing finances, clearing a path for candidate Graham Platner to face Susan Collins.

title: You've heard of TACO Trump. Now what does NACHO mean?
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's back and forth tariff orders led some to say TACO. Now with ongoing closures to the Strait of Hormuz, some are saying NACHO.

title: Some 287 nominated for 2026 Nobel Peace Prize, Trump likely among them
shortDescription: The identities of nominees for the Peace Prize are kept secret for 50 years. This year's nominees include 208 individuals, 79 organizations.

title: Secret CIA program will get congressional hearing, GOP rep says
shortDescription: A Florida congresswoman says a congressional hearing examining the CIA’s MKUltra program is scheduled for May 13.

title: Janet Mills drops out of Maine Senate race, making way for Platner
shortDescription: Gov. Janet Mills has suspended her Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate, making way for political novice Graham Platner to face Sen. Susan Collins.

title: Limited-edition Trump portrait passport explained
shortDescription: The State Department plans a limited Trump portrait passport for Americas 250th anniversary. Here is where it will be available and when.
